title: Travere Therapeutics 宣布 FILSPARI®（司帕森坦）获 FDA 完全批准，成为首个且唯一获批治疗 FSGS 的药物 - BioSpace
summary: 美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）已批准 FILSPARI®（司帕森坦），用于降低 8 岁及以上患有局灶节段性肾小球硬化（FSGS）且无肾病综合征的成人和儿科患者的蛋白尿。FILSPARI 是 FDA 批准的首个且唯一用于该适应症的药物。

title: FDA flexibility isn’t absent but evolving regulations come with growing pains - BioSpace
summary: The FDA has been repeatedly criticized by politicians, patient advocates and biotech executives alike for a lack of flexibility—not to mention clarity—in its regulation, particularly of rare disease therapies.
